anchor_reference: PARAGON-HF (NCT01920711): near-neutral primary result with subgroup-sensitive signal.
TOPCAT (NCT00094302): mixed signal and regional heterogeneity concerns.
EMPEROR-Preserved (NCT03057951) and DELIVER (NCT03619213): reduced HF hospitalization-driven composite risk.
Major HFpEF SGLT2 RCTs generally do not show excess overall serious adverse events.
